name: shopify-product-feed-monitor
description: Read public Shopify storefront product feeds and normalize product, variant, price, tag, and publish-date fields.
business_value: No-key ecommerce competitor catalog and pricing monitoring.

auth.note: Uses public storefront JSON where available.

verification_result: Live smoke checked Allbirds products.json and received product rows without an API key.
known_risks: Some stores block or disable product feeds.
This is an undocumented storefront convention, not the authenticated Shopify Admin API.
Keep usage low and respect storefront terms.
